content: I had no idea anyone would target my son. I’ve been a law-abiding citizen. I don’t owe anyone money. I’ve never been involved in any illegal land deals — those are lies spread by Manoj Verma after he was fired. I haven’t spoken to Rohan in over a year — I deleted his number. I didn’t know about the calls until the police showed me the recovered logs. I didn’t know Priya had access to my printer. I didn’t know Ramesh had a tracker device. I didn’t know about the motorcycle. I’m devastated. I just want my son back. I’m cooperating fully. I’ve offered ₹5 crore reward for information. I have nothing to hide.
